entity.summary: Ireland-linked centralized cryptocurrency exchange that disappeared in 2019 after users reported being unable to withdraw funds and the exchange website and social channels went offline.
entity.notes: Death date follows public reporting that the platform became inaccessible in June 2019. Classified as scam_rug because the reported collapse involved disappearance of the platform and unresolved customer assets rather than an orderly shutdown.

events.title: Bitsane operated as a centralized exchange
events.description: Bitsane operated as a centralized cryptocurrency exchange and was known for supporting XRP trading pairs before its 2019 disappearance.
events.notes: Year-level launch date based on exchange database and public background references.

events.title: Users reported withdrawal problems
events.description: Users reported difficulty withdrawing funds from Bitsane before the exchange website and social accounts disappeared.
events.notes: Pre-collapse access issue based on public reporting and user-loss coverage.

events.title: Bitsane disappeared from the web
events.description: Bitsane's website and social channels went offline in June 2019, leaving customers reporting lost or inaccessible funds.
events.notes: Used as death_date because the platform became inaccessible and did not return as an operating exchange.

evidence.title: Bitsane exchange profile
evidence.notes: Used for exchange profile and market-history context.

evidence.title: Irish crypto exchange Bitsane may have pulled exit scam
evidence.notes: Used for user withdrawal problems, disappearance, and alleged exit-scam context.

evidence.title: Cryptocurrency exchange Bitsane vanishes, leaving customers without access to funds
evidence.notes: Used for the exchange disappearance and customer-fund access claims.

evidence.title: Bitsane cryptocurrency exchange disappears from the internet
evidence.notes: Secondary report for the disappearance and offline status.
